bug_fields.bug_title: The REST-API component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: Test d
bug_fields.error_message: Error: Cleanup failed: DELETE /api/rest/v1/volume/VOL89DLBNP7 returned HTTP 401 Unauthorized. Token expired during long-running test suite. 2 volumes not deleted.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during REST-API validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

workaround_steps: Cleanup job now uses service account with non-expiring token
Token refresh added as first step of cleanup script
Manually delete orphaned volumes: powerstore volume delete --name 'temp-test-*' --force

bug_fields.bug_title: The VolumeManager component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: T
bug_fields.error_message: Error: AssertionError: volume VOLUDGZVGT9 mount state expected MOUNTED, got MOUNTING. Wait timeout: 45s exceeded. Test: failover_test.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during VolumeManager validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

bug_fields.bug_title: The SnapEngine component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: Snap
bug_fields.error_message: Error: Snapshot create failed: pool_id=POOLA691X3, error=ENOSPC (28), available_blocks=512976, metadata_reserved=67789. Space accounting mismatch detected.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during SnapEngine validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

reason: No candidate shares the same underlying failure template

bug_fields.bug_title: The AutoSupport component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: Aut
bug_fields.error_message: Error: AutoSupport upload failed: URL=https://autosupport.dellemc.com/upload, error=SSL_ERROR_HANDSHAKE_FAILURE, TLS_version=TLSv1.0. Server requires TLS 1.2+.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during AutoSupport validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

workaround_steps: AutoSupport client updated to enforce TLS 1
Configure proxy to handle TLS upgrade: set https_proxy with TLS 1
Or manually upload bundles via dell

bug_fields.bug_title: The REST-API component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: Robot
bug_fields.error_message: Error: ImportError: cannot import name 'Session' from 'requests' (version 2.27.0). RequestsLibrary requires requests>=2.29.0. Conflict in requirements.txt.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during REST-API validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

workaround_steps: txt updated with pinned compatible versions
Dependency audit added to CI pipeline pre-check stage
Pin library versions: pip install requests=={req_ver} RequestsLibrary=={lib_ver} --force-reinstall in

bug_fields.bug_title: The FaultManager component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: Po
bug_fields.error_message: Error: Firmware upgrade interrupted: node_B reboot detected at step 16/24. Upgrade halted at 58%. Array state: MAINTENANCE_MODE. Recovery required.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during FaultManager validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

workaround_steps: Upgrade sequencer fixed to handle unexpected reboots gracefully
Rollback and retry logic added in upgrade framework
Run upgrade recovery procedure: powerstore upgrade recover --array {env}

bug_fields.bug_title: The REST-API component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: Pytest
bug_fields.error_message: Error: POWERSTORE_HOST=10.201.210.197 — production array targeted. Expected: 10.245.177.131. Env var not reset from previous run. Tests executed against wrong target.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during REST-API validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

workaround_steps: Pipeline now uses isolated environment namespaces per run
Environment variables scoped to pipeline execution context
Always run tests with explicit --target flag: pytest --target={cor

bug_fields.bug_title: The PowerStore-Core component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary:
bug_fields.error_message: Error: pytest collected 0 items after marker filter '-m sanity and not integration'. Expected ~64 tests. Tests NOT RUN. Build marked SUCCESS incorrectly.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during PowerStore-Core validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

workaround_steps: Test suite execution configuration reviewed
Marker expressions validated against expected test counts as gate check
Update Jenkinsfile pytest command: change '-m sanity and not integration

bug_fields.bug_title: The StoragePool component failed during pipeline execution. Failure summary: Sto
bug_fields.error_message: Error: Write failed: pool_id=POOLMPZQIW, usage=97%, threshold=95%. ENOSPC returned to all write operations. Auto-expand policy: DISABLED.
bug_fields.symptoms: Observed during StoragePool validation; pipeline marked FAILURE

workaround_steps: Alert threshold lowered to 80% to provide advance warning
Delete old test snapshots: powerstore snapshot delete --older-than 7d
Then run pool cleanup ta
